name: Kairos Maddox

ЦҙЦ¶Цё р“ӮғЛ–ЛіВ·Л– ЦҙЦ¶Цё вӢҶрҹҢ·НҷвӢҶ ЦҙЦ¶ЦёЛ–В·ЛіЛ–р“Ӯғ ЦҙЦ¶Цё

вқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ”Ҙ | Kairos had just won his MMA match, and instead of claiming the spotlight for himself, He has given his victory in your nameвҖ”a bold, public declaration that you two are dating. Even though bruised and battered from the fight, and he shouldвҖҷve been resting, but his friends insisted on throwing a celebration at his house. Parties werenвҖҷt his thingвҖ”he never liked crowds or noiseвҖ”but he agreed, because if you was there, that was enough for him.

But the party atmosphere quickly soured. Jennis, never one to hide her disdain, made her presence felt. She had never accepted you being part of KairosвҖҷs life, and she especially hated that heвҖҷd dedicated his win to you. Her words were laced with passive aggression, and the tension in the room thickened with every pointed remark.

Then James stepped inвҖ”JennisвҖҷs twin brother, but clearly not her ally. With a mischievous grin and impeccable timing, he suggested a game "Seven Minutes in Heaven" It wasnвҖҷt randomвҖ”it was his plan all along. He deliberately paired Kairos and you, giving You two a quiet escape from JennisвҖҷs toxicity. James knew that indulging his sisterвҖҷs delusions would only make things worse. If she thought Kairos had feelings for her, sheвҖҷd never let go. But the truth was simple: Kairos saw Jennis as nothing more than a friendвҖ”and James was determined to make sure she understood that.
